body:
in `main` we have centered advection in the vertical. This is mostly just for performance. I think we should use the WENO advection scheme also in the vertical as a default, it is a safer and probably more accurate default. 
People that want to experiment with a more performant simulation can manually change the vertical advection.

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Change advection defaults

body:
This PR adds printing of the globally-averaged surface temperature in the one-degree example.

I'd also like to add a few time-series. I'm thinking:

* globally-averaged surface temperature
* mixed layer depth
* globally-averaged fluxes

title: Print globally averaged surface temperature for one-degree example
